notes: Trudeau resigned June 1984; Turner briefly PM; Mulroney won Sept 1984 election. Liberal assigned as dominant party for majority of year.
Mulroney resigned Feb 1993; Campbell PM to Oct 1993; Chretien won Oct 1993 election. Conservative assigned as dominant for majority of year.
Chretien resigned Dec 2003; Martin succeeded him
Martin lost confidence vote Jan 2006; Harper won Feb 2006 election with minority. Conservative assigned as dominant party.
Harper lost Oct 2015 election; J. Trudeau won majority. Conservative assigned as dominant for majority of year.
